perceivedDisruption.question: During the reading task, do you feel your attention was split between reading the text and replying to messages?
If you received messages during the reading task, to what extent did replying to them distract you from the reading task?

perceivedAIUsefulness.question: The AI assistant was useful in helping me identify and integrate important information.
Did you feel the AI reading assistant helped you read the passage more efficiently (e.g., saving time or effort)?
